The body of the Wicked Witch of the East dries up, leaving behind enchanted silver shoes which are given to Dorothy. When Dorothy asks to go home, she learns the land is impassable, but a magical slate reveals her path: the Emerald City to see Oz the Great.

Dorothy looking toward the path to the Emerald City with determination.
Discovery of the silver shoes leads to a realization of being trapped, resolved by the magical slate's guidance.
